records.ety: [OE. brewis, brouwys, browesse, brewet, OF. brouet, -s being the OF. ending of the nom. sing. and acc. pl.; dim. of OHG. brod. √93. See Broth, and cf. Brose.]

quotes: Let them of their Bonner's “beef” and “broth” make what brewis they please for their credulous guests.

defs: Bread soaked in broth, drippings of roast meat, milk, or water and butter.
